## Summary

-

## Local Verification

- [ ] `./script/ci.sh`
- [ ] `./script/e2e_user_smoke.sh`
- [ ] App launched locally when UI behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshot proof attached when visual behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] Does not rename, move, delete, or rewrite real Cubase/music files
- [ ] Uses fixtures or dry-run paths for archive/opening tests
- [ ] Keeps product code native Swift/SwiftUI/AppKit

## Notes

GitHub Actions are not required for this repo. Local green gates are the release signal.
